brand.name: Lmverse
brand.description: LmVerse is a platform for learning and tutoring international languages

book_consultation_modal.title: Sign up for a free online lesson
book_consultation_modal.description: Fill out the form below and our manager will contact you soon to answer all your questions and help you choose the optimal training program.

messages.levelConsultation: I would like to book a consultation for the {level} level.

quotes.text: To have another language is to possess a second soul.
quotes.author: Charlemagne

quotes.text: Language is the road map of a culture. It tells you where its people come from and where they are going.
quotes.author: Rita Mae Brown

quotes.text: One language sets you in a corridor for life. Two languages open every door along the way.
quotes.author: Frank Smith

hero.title: Learn languages effectively
hero.description: Our specialized online courses are designed to bring the classroom experience to you, no matter where you are.
hero.trusted: Trusted by over 15K Users worldwide since 2024
hero.subtitle: Start speaking from the first lesson
hero.cta1: Sign up for a fee online trial session

starter.description: The foundation of the English language is the basic grammatical structures, keywords and correct pronunciation, without which it is impossible to build complex sentences and understand speech.

beginner.title: Beginner | Elementary | Pre-level
beginner.description: Ideal for those who are just starting to learn a language and want to gradually speak confidently.

intermediate.title: Intermediate | Upper intermediate
intermediate.description: This is an advanced stage when you communicate confidently in English, understand complex texts, and express your thoughts freely.

advanced.title: Advanced | Proficiency
advanced.description: The advanced level makes it easy to understand everything you hear and read, to express thoughts freely and accurately, even in difficult situations.

programs.title: Our Programs have been designed for your convenience

whyJoinUs.title: Why join us?
whyJoinUs.description: We are a team of native speakers and experienced teachers who have joined forces to create a unique educational platform. Each of our teachers has international certificates and experience working with students of various levels. We believe that everyone can learn English, and we are ready to help you with this.

points.0: Courses are for all ages and levels — from complete beginners to fluent speakers
points.1: Learn through real dialogues, movies, songs, and life scenarios.
points.2: Your progress and mistakes are not ignored.

whyJoinUs.register: Register for a free trial lesson

speakingSection.subtitle: at LmVerse
speakingSection.title: Immediately start speaking effectively in English
speakingSection.description: Native speakers and highly qualified, experienced teachers provide high-quality instruction while helping students develop natural language proficiency. Our approach to language learning is centered on practical, real-life communication, making it the core component of every lesson. Classes are flexible and adapt to your schedule, allowing you to study whenever it is convenient — without stress or unnecessary pressure.

bullets.0: Stay motivated with highly qualified instructors
bullets.1: Keep up with an effective approach to learning
bullets.2: Build confidence through flexibility in learning

elementary.title: Elementary
elementary.description: For those who are not familiar with the language at all. Lots of grammar and basic rules.

individual.title: Individual
individual.description: Courses tailored to your individual learning style and pace, guaranteeing progress and success.

business.title: Business English
business.description: Course focused on developing the key skills necessary for a successful career.

group.title: Group lessons
group.description: Lessons in a group of up to 8 people. A lot of conversational practice. Interactive learning materials.

tutor.title: Become A Tutor
tutor.description: Top tutors from around the world teach hundreds of students different international languages.

newsletter.title: Become a student
newsletter.description: Learning a language is not an obligation. This is an opportunity. And we've made it accessible. Start today. No pressure. No deadline. Without fear.
